data.title: Hong Kong Asia Holdings announced that it spent HK$5.9369 million to increase its holdings of 7.88 bitcoins
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Hong Kong-listed company Hong Kong Asia Holdings issued an announcement, announcing that its board of directors has approved the company to further increase its investment in Bitcoin, and on the 20th of this month, it conducted a series of transactions on the cryptocurrency trading platform on the open market to purchase approximately 7.88 units of Bitcoin, with a total cost of approximately HK$5.9369 million, which was paid with funds from the group's internal resources. It currently holds approximately 8.88 units of Bitcoin, with an average cost of HK$756,200.

data.title: Bybit Hacker Transfers Funds to Thorchain Router
data.description: According to PANews, BeosinTrace has tracked the movement of funds from the Bybit hacker address 0xfc926659dd8808f6e3e0a8d61b20b871f3fa6465. The transfer began on February 23, 2025, at 21:37:23 UTC+8. The funds were directed towards a dormant address and the Thorchain:Router.

data.title: Ripple CTO Exposes Major Crypto Misinformation
data.description:
Ripple CTO David Schwartz calls out misinformation in crypto space
source: https://u.today/ripple-cto-exposes-major-crypto-misinformation

data.title: Changpeng Zhao wants to donate $1M community gift
data.description:
The co-founder of Binance, Changpeng Zhao has announced on X that he wants to donate the $1 million he received as a gift from the crypto community.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/changpeng-zhao-donate-1m-community-gift/

data.title: AI's Premium Price Tags Are Creating a New Digital Divide
data.description:
As companies roll out $100+ monthly subscriptions for AI tools, experts warn that the technology meant to "democratize" innovation is leaving most of the world behind.
source: https://decrypt.co/306117/ai-premium-price-tags-new-digital-divide

data.title: Pumpfun frontend removes Lazarus-related meme coins
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Pumpfun front-end deleted the Meme coin related to Lazarus. 
Previously, the Bybit attacker was suspected of issuing Meme tokens on Pumpfun for money laundering. The attacker transferred SOL tokens to a certain address and then launched Meme coins.

data.title: An address withdrew about 940,000 $OM from Binance, worth $7.9 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: On-chain data shows that about 4 minutes ago, an address withdrew 939,999.56 $OM from Binance, worth US$7,905,396.30.

data.title: Greeks.Live: The community is bullish on Ethereum, but there are concerns that it may fall back to $2,600
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Greeks.Live macro researcher Adam released a Chinese community briefing, which disclosed that Ethereum is generally bullish and believes that it is expected to hit $4,000 after breaking through $2,800. Some believe that breaking through $2,750 under low liquidity over the weekend shows a strong momentum, but there are also concerns that it may fall back to $2,600. The options market shows a negative Gamma state in the $2,700-3,900 range, which means that volatility may increase. Market makers need Delta hedging at the current position, and the rally may continue. In terms of market structure, there is a lack of resistance to rapid growth.

data.title: Bybit raised 254,830 ETH in 48 hours after hack
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to updated data released by Spot On Chain, Bybit raised 254,830 ETH (US$693 million) within 48 hours after the hacker attack, including: 
132,178 ETH (US$367 million), which may have been obtained through OTC transactions with Galaxy Digital, FalconX and Wintermute; 
122,652 ETH (US$326 million), loans from trading platforms/institutions such as Bitget, MEXC, Binance and DWF Labs (it may also be personal borrowing behavior of some whales). 
At the same time, hackers have exchanged 40,944 ETH (US$115 million) across chains for BTC and other assets through Chainflip, THORChain, LiFi, DLN and eXch. The hacker currently still holds 458,451 ETH ($1.29 billion), accounting for about 91.7% of the stolen 499,395 ETH ($1.4 billion).

data.title: LBank is now online on VK Official (KOHLI)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, LBank has launched VK Official (KOHLI) at 17:30 (SGT) on February 23, and opened the KOHLI/USDT trading pair. Currently, the deposit service is open, and the withdrawal service will be open at 17:00 on February 24.
